title: aconitum neotortuosum
intro: Aconitum neotortuosum is a species of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae, commonly known as the monk's hood or wolf's bane. Traditionally, Aconitum neotortuosum has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat a range of health issues. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Aconitum neotortuosum is often prepared as a tincture, extract, or dried root for use in herbal remedies, although caution must be exercised due to its toxicity and potential side effects.
